obligations.rule: Default behavior: validate URLs with protocols ['http', 'https', 'ftp'], require_tld=true, require_protocol=false, require_host=true, allow_fragments=true, allow_query_components=true, validate_length=true.
obligations.why: Ensure the function correctly validates URLs under default settings.

obligations.rule: Option protocols: validate URLs with custom protocols.
obligations.why: Ensure the function respects the `protocols` option.

obligations.rule: Option require_tld=false: allow URLs without a top-level domain.
obligations.why: Ensure the function respects the `require_tld` option.

obligations.rule: Option require_protocol=true: reject URLs without a protocol.
obligations.why: Ensure the function respects the `require_protocol` option.

obligations.rule: Option require_host=false: allow URLs without a host.
obligations.why: Ensure the function respects the `require_host` option.

obligations.rule: Option require_port=true: require URLs to include a port.
obligations.why: Ensure the function respects the `require_port` option.

obligations.rule: Option allow_underscores=true: allow underscores in hostnames.
obligations.why: Ensure the function respects the `allow_underscores` option.

obligations.rule: Option host_whitelist: validate URLs against a whitelist of hosts.
obligations.why: Ensure the function respects the `host_whitelist` option.

obligations.rule: Option host_blacklist: reject URLs with blacklisted hosts.
obligations.why: Ensure the function respects the `host_blacklist` option.

obligations.rule: Option allow_trailing_dot=true: allow domains with trailing dots.
obligations.why: Ensure the function respects the `allow_trailing_dot` option.
Ensure the function respects the `allow_protocol_relative_urls` option.

obligations.rule: Option allow_fragments=false: reject URLs with fragments.
obligations.why: Ensure the function respects the `allow_fragments` option.

obligations.rule: Option allow_query_components=false: reject URLs with query components.
obligations.why: Ensure the function respects the `allow_query_components` option.

obligations.rule: Option disallow_auth=true: reject URLs with authentication components.
obligations.why: Ensure the function respects the `disallow_auth` option.

obligations.rule: Option validate_length=false: skip URL length validation.
obligations.why: Ensure the function respects the `validate_length` option.

obligations.rule: Option max_allowed_length: reject URLs longer than the specified length.
obligations.why: Ensure the function respects the `max_allowed_length` option.

test_groups.title: Default behavior validation
test_groups.rationale: Tests the default behavior of the validator with common valid and invalid URLs.

test_groups.title: Custom protocols validation
test_groups.rationale: Ensures the validator respects custom protocols specified in the options.

test_groups.title: Allow URLs without TLD
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when the `require_tld` option is disabled.

test_groups.title: Require protocol validation
test_groups.rationale: Ensures the validator rejects URLs without a protocol when `require_protocol` is enabled.

test_groups.title: Allow URLs without host
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when the `require_host` option is disabled.

test_groups.title: Require port validation
test_groups.rationale: Ensures the validator requires a port when `require_port` is enabled.

test_groups.title: Allow underscores in hostnames
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when underscores are allowed in hostnames.

test_groups.title: Host whitelist validation
test_groups.rationale: Ensures the validator respects the host whitelist.

test_groups.title: Host blacklist validation
test_groups.rationale: Ensures the validator rejects URLs with blacklisted hosts.

test_groups.title: Allow trailing dot in domains
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when trailing dots are allowed in domains.

test_groups.title: Allow protocol-relative URLs
test_groups.rationale: Ensures the validator allows protocol-relative URLs.

test_groups.title: Reject URLs with fragments
test_groups.rationale: Ensures the validator rejects URLs with fragments when `allow_fragments` is disabled.

test_groups.title: Reject URLs with query components
test_groups.rationale: Ensures the validator rejects URLs with query components when `allow_query_components` is disabled.

test_groups.title: Reject URLs with authentication components
test_groups.rationale: Ensures the validator rejects URLs with authentication components when `disallow_auth` is enabled.

test_groups.title: Skip URL length validation
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when URL length validation is disabled.

test_groups.title: Reject URLs longer than max_allowed_length
test_groups.rationale: Ensures the validator rejects URLs longer than the specified maximum length.
